displayTitle: Darth Vader: Dark Lord of the Sith, Vol. 4: Fortress Vader
synopsis: In the final chapter of the infamous Darth Vader story by Charles Soule, we see not only the construction of Vader's Castle on Mustafar, but the ancient Sith Lord who aids in its construction—and almost defeats Vader in the process. . .
title: Darth Vader: Dark Lord of the Sith, Vol. 4: Fortress Vader
